mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, toy_mac, accessory_mac, accessory_type, created_at FROM toy_accessories WHERE toy_mac = #{toyMac} AND accessory_type = #{accessoryType} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, toy_mac, accessory_mac, accessory_type, created_at FROM toy_accessories WHERE toy_mac = #{toyMac} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id, toy_mac, accessory_mac, accessory_type, created_at FROM toy_accessories WHERE accessory_mac = #{accessoryMac} LIMIT 1
